tasks.title: Track RuoYi + Vue3 base integration and runtime validation
tasks.statusReason: Governance/runtime clarification CR-20260626T004832Z-governance-runtime-verification-boundary is R-04: it documents that npm run check is governance consistency plus Node structural tests, not production readiness, runtime business correctness, database migration safety, browser acceptance, money-flow idempotency, or complete high-risk semantic coverage. It does not modify customer runtime code, create sales-order runtime code, change production safety config, change the customer fund model, alter migration/idempotency registry, change database business structure, or edit package/scripts/tools/tests.
tasks.nextStep: Choose R-05 salesman candidate hardening or R-06 executable customer migration baseline. Keep beforeSalesOrder blocked unless required contracts and review explicitly unlock it later.
